# Comet

Scraper that queries a [Comet](https://github.com/g0ldyy/comet) instance for torrents.
Comet speaks the Stremio addon protocol, so results arrive already keyed by IMDb ID,
season, and episode.

There is no public instance guaranteed to stay up — point `url` at your own deployment
if you care about reliability.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs` from each plugin's `settings_schema()`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Sources

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.media-item.scrape.requested`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__COMET__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `url` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__COMET__url` | url | Yes | `https://comet.feels.legal` | Base URL of your Comet instance. |
<!-- END GENERATED -->
